full_text:
Han Hao (Yuansi) 韓浩 (元嗣)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Han Hao (韓浩), styledYuansi (元嗣), was born in Henei. Rescued Xiahou Dun from being held hostage. Supported the farm reforms. Han Hao was affiliated with Wang Kuang, Yuan Shu, and the Wei Kingdom. Han Hao lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
